description: The Almighty Vice Lord Nation is the second-largest street and prison gang in Chicago, Illinois, founded in 1957 by African American youths in the North Lawndale neighborhood. It is a founding member of the People Nation alliance and engages in drug sales, robbery, extortion, and murder. The gang attempted to soften its image in the 1960s as the Conservative Vice Lords but continued criminal activities. It remains active with an estimated 30,000–35,000 members.
